patches_applied: 01_title narration: removed unverified 'one full FRQ per exam' claim; replaced with the documented Unit 8 weighting (10-15% MC).
04_cross_sections_setup narration: added 'The base region lives flat in the xy-plane; each slice rises out of it perpendicular to the x-axis' to prevent base-vs-cross-section confusion.
12_washer_around_other_axis narration: tightened the BECAUSE phrasing ('whichever curve sits LOWER is FARTHER from y equals two').
13_axis_choice narration: added bridge to dy-integration: 'swap every dee x for dee y' so students get the rule even without a worked dy example.
19_path content_hint and narration: softened OpenStax section reference from specific '6.2 and 6.3' to generic 'chapter six — volumes by slicing.'
deferred_non_blocking: Isoceles-right-triangle cross-section formula (B): out of scope, three listed shapes cover most-frequent FRQ.
15_pause1_silence narration ~140 words (B): acceptable for worked-solution reveal slide.
'Unit 8b' GIIS internal designation (C): matches Module 10 'Unit 8a' pattern.
